'''Joto Eckels''' was a field [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]].

==Biography==
He worked with the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] and worked on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] before being sent to [[Brath Qella]] to aide [[Kroddok Stopa]] and [[Josala Krenn]] in their excavation of the [[Qella]] culture. Later he would get the chance to join [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] onboard the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]''.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
